    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "The analysis of 17,049 e-commerce transactions shows that the business is performing well, with high customer satisfaction and strong sales across multiple product categories. Female customers and the 25–45 age group contribute the most to sales. Istanbul, Ankara, and Izmir are the top-performing cities, while Electronics and Home & Garden generate the highest revenue despite Sports, Beauty, and Books having the highest purchase volume. January, February, and March recorded the highest sales performance, leading in both transaction volume and total revenue. Most customers prefer Credit Card and Debit Card payments, mobile devices are the primary shopping platform, customers largely give 5-star ratings, and most orders are delivered within 4–5 days. These findings indicate a healthy customer experience and a strong market position."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "NGhlliIMLGkR"
      }
    },
    {

      "source": [
        "Advice :"
      ],

      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "1. Increase inventory and marketing for Electronics and Home & Garden to maximize revenue.\n",
        "2. Continue promoting Sports, Beauty, and Books to maintain high purchase volume.\n",
        "3. Focus marketing campaigns on female customers and the 25–45 age group, as they are the most valuable customer segments.\n",
        "4. Introduce seasonal promotions and targeted campaigns during January, February, and March to maximize sales during the strongest-performing period.\n",
        "5. Invest more in Istanbul, Ankara, and Izmir, while creating targeted campaigns to improve sales in lower-performing cities.\n",
        "6. Optimize the mobile shopping experience, as most customers purchase using mobile devices.\n",
        "7. Maintain secure and smooth Credit Card and Debit Card payment options.\n",
        "8. Continue maintaining 4–5 day delivery and strive for even faster shipping to improve customer satisfaction.\n",
        "9. Use customer feedback and 5-star ratings to strengthen customer loyalty and encourage repeat purchases."
